title: poa aurea
intro: Poa aurea, also known as Golden Bentgrass, is a perennial grass species native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Poa aurea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Poa aurea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
